steps.name: the user is on the login page of the LMS smartcliff website
the user enters the login credentials
the user clicks the signin button
the user should be logged in successfully
the user clicks on the dynamic field Settings icon
the user clicks on the Add Service button
the user enters service name "Electronics"
the user enters description "Build the PCB board for the ESP32"
the user clicks on the Create Service button
the service should be created successfully
the user is on the login page of the LMS smartcliff website
the user enters the login credentials
the user clicks the signin button
the user should be logged in successfully
the user clicks on the dynamic field Settings icon
the user clicks on the Add Service button
the user enters service name "Software"
the user enters description "Build an end-to-end food ordering application"
the user clicks on the Create Service button
the service should be created successfully

elements.name: Add a service without a description

steps.name: the user is on the login page of the LMS smartcliff website
the user enters the login credentials
the user clicks the signin button
the user should be logged in successfully
the user clicks on the Dynamic Field Settings icon
the user clicks on the Add Service button
the user enters the following service details
the user clicks on the Create Service button
the Description field should display the required field validation message

elements.name: Add a service with empty details

the user clicks the signin button

description:
Feature Description:
              As a registered user,I want to log in to the LMS-smartcliff website.

elements.name: Verify user can navigate using pagination buttons

steps.name: the user is on the login page of the LMS smartcliff website

result.name: Admin on the Dashboard Page after Login
Admin navigate to Course Management Page
the user is on the "1" page of the Course Structure table
the user should be navigated to the "2" page

steps.name: Verify user can navigate using pagination buttons
Admin on the Dashboard Page after Login
the user enters the login credentials
Admin navigate to Course Management Page
the user is on the "2" page of the Course Structure table
the user clicks the "Previous" button
User clicks the Next button
Login with an invalid email and an invalid password
the user is on the login page of the LMS smartcliff website
the user enters the login credentials
the user clicks the signin button
the user should be navigated to the "1" page
Verify user can navigate to a specific page using the page number
Admin on the Dashboard Page after Login
Admin navigate to Course Management Page
the user is on the Course Structure table
the user clicks page number "2"
the user should be navigated to the "2" page
Verify user can navigate to a specific page using the page number
Admin on the Dashboard Page after Login
